problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
